description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Organized your favorite shops through "discover → support → show friends" flow.

• New "Everyone's Favorite Shops" section — Browse shops that others have registered as favorites without logging in. Filter and sort by open now, distance, or popularity. Find it at /@hanno/ menu under "🏪 Everyone's Favorite Shops"
• Unified naming — Your lists are now called My Favorite Shops / My Favorite Shop Friends, community listings are Everyone's Favorite Shops
• Standardized shop owner term to "Owner" — Previously mixed terms like "manager" and "shop owner" are now all "Owner". Site staff are distinguished as "Operator"
• Shop page QR code now accessible to everyone — Owners see it expanded by default; others tap "📱 Show QR Code" to open. Tap to copy URL, 📤 share, or 📷 scan another QR (friend invite, owner application, etc.)
• Owner registration auto-adds shop to your favorites — When you become an owner, that shop automatically joins your favorite shops list
• Can choose to become favorite shop friends when applying/approving as owner — Both applicant and approver can check a box to become friends (both on by default)
• When a favorite shop friend is an owner, can add their shop too — When accepting a friend invite, select their shops with checkboxes to add all at once
• "🏪 Owner" badge on your shop page — Appears next to ✓ Supported so people instantly see you're the owner
• Shortcut to "👥 My Favorite Shop Friends" on Myはんのう home — Always shown for logged-in users
• "+ Support" button appears on shop pages even for non-logged-in users — Tap to log in, then automatically adds shop to favorites
